trial_type.Description: Type of event (different from EEGLAB convention)

Levels.S32: When it appears before S100, it represents L1. L1 refers to  the first intensity level used to evoke the Laser-Evoked Potential(LEP)
Levels.S33: When it appears before S100, it represents L2. L2 refers to  the second intensity level used to evoke the Laser-Evoked Potential(LEP).
Levels.S34: When it appears before S100, it represents L3. L3 refers to  the third intensity level used to evoke the Laser-Evoked Potential(LEP).
Levels.S35: When it appears before S100, it represents L4.L4 refers to  the fourth intensity level used to evoke the Laser-Evoked Potential(LEP)
